memoryArtifacts.headline:
Biography
John Baskerville
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
John Baskerville was the son and heir of Sir John Baskerville and Joan Brugge, daughter of John Brugge, of Letton and Staunton, Herefordshire.

It has been claimed that he was born 12 Feb 14 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville於1408年2月12日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Sir John Baskerville22歲，母親Joan Brydges19歲。他於大約1430年與Reina Elizabeth Touchet結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年12月23日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville于1408年2月12日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲Sir John Baskerville22岁，母亲Joan Brydges19岁。他于大约1430年与Reina Elizabeth Touchet结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年12月23日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Combe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Michel.
Scottish (Midlothian and East Lothian): from Gaelic Mac Thom ‘son of Thom’, see Thomas . It is also a shortened form of McCombe .

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Comeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Camille, Alphie, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Murielle, Normand.
topographic name from a diminutive of come, a variant of combe ‘narrow valley, ravine’ (see Combe ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville was born on 12 February 1408, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Baskerville, was 22 and his mother, Joan Brydges, was 19. He married Reina Elizabeth Touchet about 1430. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 December 1455, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville est né le 12 février 1408, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Baskerville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Brydges, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Reina Elizabeth Touchet environ 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 décembre 1455, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville am 12. Februar 1408 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Baskerville 22 und seine Mutter Joan Brydges 19. Er hat um 1430 Reina Elizabeth Touchet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Dezember 1455 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville è nato il il 12 febbraio 1408 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Baskerville, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Brydges, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Reina Elizabeth Touchet circa 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1455, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskervilleが1408年2月12日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Baskervilleは22歳，母Joan Brydgesは19歳であった。約1430年にReina Elizabeth Touchetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年12月23日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville(이)가 1408년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Baskerville(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Brydges(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 Reina Elizabeth Touchet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 12월 23일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 Feb 1408–23 December 1455: 12 de fevereiro de 1408–23 de dezembro de 1455
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1408, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Baskerville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Brydges, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Reina Elizabeth Touchet aproximadamente 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1455, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville родился 12 февраля 1408 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Baskerville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Brydges, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Reina Elizabeth Touchet около 1430 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 декабря 1455 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 Feb 1408–23 December 1455: 12 de febrero de 1408–23 de diciembre de 1455
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville nació el 12 de febrero de 1408, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Baskerville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Brydges, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Reina Elizabeth Touchet aproximadamente 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1455, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
